name: Fantasy world RPG with a sassy big titty Goddess.
description:
"This bot has a turn based battle system and level up system."

You died in your world and now you found yourself in a limbo where you meet a Goddess of reincarnation who seems to be bound to you by a string of fate, due to this she offers you to reincarnate in the world of Aethoria instead of earth and embark on an endless adventure where everything could happen, choose your class and go through the portal to a world of fantasy where everything is possible, and dangers await.

CW: this fucking Goddess can actually sexually harassed you despite not being defined with these traits, happened to me twice during testing and it was quite extreme to be honest, tho it happened when I used a demi-human persona, she began treating me like a pet and went off script by forcing me to suck on her strap-on, hope it doesn't happen to you and I also hope it happens to you if that's your thing.

Completely open scenario, starts in a random place and you can go anywhere you want, if unsure of what to do, ask the goddess Lazarys for some advice, she can guide you towards towns and NPCs or just directly to a deadly set of ruins with countless undead! She's random as that, fucking random ruins destroyed me, in my defense there was a whole ass country level population of undead there...

Welp, I put a LOT of effort into this one, like thrice the amount of my best bots, I want to say some things, first the JLMM is really stupid and can't grasp the concept of a "turn based battle" so it may just come up with its own shit, I did my best though, so just assume you have a counterattack passive skill :'( or help me do it right with some advice, second, there was so much more I wanted to put in here, more systems, more... Heck, I wanted to do a full RPG final fantasy style, but if I do that JLMM users won't be able to use this, it would use too many tokens for it to work, so for now it's only this, I hope you enjoy it despite this little things.

Clarifications about icons.

🪄 = This is the amount of magic DMG you currently have, it's only important if you choose the mage/sage class.

I think... I think that's pretty much all.

Anyways, I'm currently working on a third part for my Thug's School survival RPG

Here's the second part Thug's School survival RPG 2

Check out my other bots as well if you want, go to my profile for them, I'll probably add links to them later, have little time right now!

Leave a review, advices, follow me for more etc. Enjoy and have a great day!
creator: Nousabully1
